SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210026078), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGMENT, LLC SERVED DEC-18-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE DEC-18-2022 AS TO DEFENDANT PASCUBELLO, OMEGA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PASCUBELLO, OMEGA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 77 BLUXOME STREET #201, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94107, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210026078)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74979063) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PASCUBELLO, OMEGA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $10,000.00 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $485.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,935.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
